+            # Penalize revisits heavily

+            revisit_penalty = visit_count * 5.0

+            # Score: utility/distance - revisit penalty

+        # Get utilities of all neighbors

+        max_utility = max(neighbor_utilities) if neighbor_utilities else 0.0
